title: aster biennis
intro: Aster biennis, also known as the common or tall white aster, is a perennial plant in the sunflower family that is native to North America. The plant's medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Aster biennis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches and migraines, and soothe digestive issues. Aster biennis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
